info.title: FSBS API
info.description: Flight Simulator Booking System — internal API. In Development use POST /dev/auth/token to obtain a Bearer token, then click Authenticate.

get.summary: Return identity claims for the authenticated caller.
Handle Cognito hosted UI redirect and exchange auth code for tokens.

post.summary: Issue a signed dev JWT for any role (dev only).
Create an AppUser + UserProfile row, replacing the Post-Confirmation Lambda (dev only).

post.description: Creates a Cognito account and sends a 6-digit confirmation code to the supplied email address. No invitation token is required. Follow up with POST /v1/auth/register/confirm to complete registration.

post.summary: Confirm registration with the emailed code.
post.description: Submits the 6-digit code sent by Cognito. On success the user's AppUser and UserProfile records are created by the Post Confirmation Lambda and the account is ready to sign in.
Asks Cognito to issue a new confirmation code. Use when the original code has expired (24-hour TTL) or was not received.

post.summary: Accept an invitation and create a CorporateManager or CorporateStudent account.
post.description: Validates the raw invitation token, creates AppUser + UserProfile + OrgMembership, and marks the invitation as Claimed in a single atomic operation. In production this is superseded by the Cognito Post-Confirmation Lambda.

get.summary: Validate a raw invitation token before showing the registration form.

post.summary: Issue a CorporateManager invitation (SalesStaff / SystemAdmin only).
Invite a CorporateStudent into the caller's own organisation (CorporateManager only).

get.summary: Return a name-sorted list of all active organisations.
Return the account summary and recent payments for an organisation.

post.summary: Record a pre-payment on account made by an organisation (SalesStaff / SystemAdmin).

get.summary: Return a cursor-paginated list of the current user's bookings.

post.summary: Reserve a simulator bay slot. Idempotency-Key header required.

get.summary: Return bookings with slots falling within a UTC date/time range.
Return all bookings awaiting SalesStaff approval (InternalStudent flow).
Return full details for a single booking owned by the current user.

put.summary: Approve a PendingApproval booking (SalesStaff / SystemAdmin only).
Reject a PendingApproval booking with a mandatory reason (SalesStaff / SystemAdmin only).
Cancel a booking. Status becomes CancelledByCustomer or CancelledByAdmin based on caller role.

get.summary: Return all simulator units with their bays and configurations.
Return a single simulator unit with its bays and configurations.
Return available slots and reconfiguration windows for a simulator.

post.summary: Add a bay to a simulator unit.
Add a configuration to a simulator unit.

get.summary: Stateless price preview. Called on every booking wizard step change. No DB write.

put.summary: Create or update the current user's profile.

get.summary: Return a pre-signed S3 PUT URL for uploading a profile photo.
